content.claim: Hungary has experienced a documented rise in SEN identification, with a fivefold increase in one diagnostic sub-category (psychological developmental disorders) over a five-year period, and significant county-level variation in identification rates
content.context: Fresh live research through the International comparison lens
limitations: County-level variation documented but no national aggregate SEN figure provided in source
Magnitude of the five-year increase period not specified with dates
Official Hungarian source confirming response but not independent verification
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
